tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSchemasCommit
tools.description: Commits a new schema revision to an existing schema.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSchemasCreate
tools.description: Creates a schema.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSchemasDelete
tools.description: Deletes a schema.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSchemasDeleteRevision
tools.description: Deletes a specific schema revision.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSchemasGet
tools.description: Gets a schema.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSchemasList
tools.description: Lists schemas in a project.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSchemasListRevisions
tools.description: Lists all schema revisions for the named schema.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSchemasRollback
tools.description: Creates a new schema revision that is a copy of the provided revision_id.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSchemasValidate
tools.description: Validates a schema.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSchemasValidateMessage
tools.description: Validates a message against a schema.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSnapshotsDelete
tools.description: Removes an existing snapshot. Snapshots are used in [Seek] (https://cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/replay-overview) operations, which allow you to manage message acknowledgments in bulk. That is, you can set the acknowledgment state of messages in an existing subscription to the state captured by a snapshot. When the snapshot is deleted, all messages retained in the snapshot are immediately dropped. After a snapshot is deleted, a new one may be created with the same name, but the new one has no association with the old snapshot or its subscription, unless the same subscription is specified.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSnapshotsGet
tools.description: Gets the configuration details of a snapshot. Snapshots are used in [Seek](https://cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/replay-overview) operations, which allow you to manage message acknowledgments in bulk. That is, you can set the acknowledgment state of messages in an existing subscription to the state captured by a snapshot.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSnapshotsList
tools.description: Lists the existing snapshots. Snapshots are used in [Seek]( https://cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/replay-overview) operations, which allow you to manage message acknowledgments in bulk. That is, you can set the acknowledgment state of messages in an existing subscription to the state captured by a snapshot.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSubscriptionsAcknowledge
tools.description: Acknowledges the messages associated with the `ack_ids` in the `AcknowledgeRequest`. The Pub/Sub system can remove the relevant messages from the subscription. Acknowledging a message whose ack deadline has expired may succeed, but such a message may be redelivered later. Acknowledging a message more than once will not result in an error.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSubscriptionsDelete
tools.description: Deletes an existing subscription. All messages retained in the subscription are immediately dropped. Calls to `Pull` after deletion will return `NOT_FOUND`. After a subscription is deleted, a new one may be created with the same name, but the new one has no association with the old subscription or its topic unless the same topic is specified.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSubscriptionsDetach
tools.description: Detaches a subscription from this topic. All messages retained in the subscription are dropped. Subsequent `Pull` and `StreamingPull` requests will return FAILED_PRECONDITION. If the subscription is a push subscription, pushes to the endpoint will stop.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSubscriptionsGet
tools.description: Gets the configuration details of a subscription.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSubscriptionsList
tools.description: Lists matching subscriptions.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSubscriptionsModifyAckDeadline
tools.description: Modifies the ack deadline for a specific message. This method is useful to indicate that more time is needed to process a message by the subscriber, or to make the message available for redelivery if the processing was interrupted. Note that this does not modify the subscription-level `ackDeadlineSeconds` used for subsequent messages.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSubscriptionsModifyPushConfig
tools.description: Modifies the `PushConfig` for a specified subscription. This may be used to change a push subscription to a pull one (signified by an empty `PushConfig`) or vice versa, or change the endpoint URL and other attributes of a push subscription. Messages will accumulate for delivery continuously through the call regardless of changes to the `PushConfig`.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSubscriptionsPull
tools.description: Pulls messages from the server.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsSubscriptionsSeek
tools.description: Seeks an existing subscription to a point in time or to a given snapshot, whichever is provided in the request. Snapshots are used in [Seek] (https://cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/replay-overview) operations, which allow you to manage message acknowledgments in bulk. That is, you can set the acknowledgment state of messages in an existing subscription to the state captured by a snapshot. Note that both the subscription and the snapshot must be on the same topic.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsTopicsCreate
tools.description: Creates the given topic with the given name. See the [resource name rules] (https://cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/admin#resource_names).

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsTopicsDelete
tools.description: Deletes the topic with the given name. Returns `NOT_FOUND` if the topic does not exist. After a topic is deleted, a new topic may be created with the same name; this is an entirely new topic with none of the old configuration or subscriptions. Existing subscriptions to this topic are not deleted, but their `topic` field is set to `_deleted-topic_`.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsTopicsGet
tools.description: Gets the configuration of a topic.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsTopicsGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsTopicsList
tools.description: Lists matching topics.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsTopicsPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing topic. Note that certain properties of a topic are not modifiable.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsTopicsPublish
tools.description: Adds one or more messages to the topic. Returns `NOT_FOUND` if the topic does not exist.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsTopicsSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy. Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` errors.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsTopicsSnapshotsList
tools.description: Lists the names of the snapshots on this topic. Snapshots are used in [Seek](https://cloud.google.com/pubsub/docs/replay-overview) operations, which allow you to manage message acknowledgments in bulk. That is, you can set the acknowledgment state of messages in an existing subscription to the state captured by a snapshot.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsTopicsSubscriptionsList
tools.description: Lists the names of the attached subscriptions on this topic.

tools.name: projects.pubsubProjectsTopicsTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error. Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
